_schema: Dialogue tree. Director-authored text (2026-07-03) — verbatim, do not edit. `variants` = alternate lines chosen at random on node entry. Option `_alts` are Director-provided alternate player lines kept for future rotation.
_status: director_approved; entry-routing blanks C1-C3, W1 pending

intro_cold.speaker: hollis
intro_cold.text: [BLANK C1 — Hollis after the botched repair: civil, cooler, keeps it short. He's not cruel — but the warmth is gone and he mentions the dealer handled it. Awaiting Director.]

options.text: [BLANK C2 — the player's apology / owning it. Awaiting Director.]

cold_thaw.speaker: hollis
cold_thaw.text: [BLANK C3 — Hollis takes the apology the county way: noted, not forgotten, door not closed. Small rep back. Awaiting Director.]

intro_warm.speaker: hollis
intro_warm.text: [BLANK W1 — Hollis after the successful fix: greets you like proof of a good decision. Maybe the baler's still running better than it should. Awaiting Director.]

intro.speaker: hollis
intro.text: Baler quit on me halfway through the back forty. Hay's cut, rain's coming, and the dealer says maybe Thursday. Hay don't wait till Thursday.
variants: Second cutting's laying out there getting older by the minute. Baler decided it'd had enough. Dealer's backed up three counties deep.

options.text: "Mind if I take a look? Might be something simple."
_alts: "Could be nothing more than a hose or fitting. Let's see what we're dealing with."
"No promises, but I've kept worse running."
options.label: [Mechanic 40]

options.text: "Can't fix it, but I can help however you need me."
_alts: "Point me where you want me and I'll work."
"I can at least help get the hay under cover."

options.text: "Sorry, Hollis. Hope the dealer gets here sooner than they think."

fix_success.speaker: hollis
fix_success.text: Well I'll be damned. Sounds better now than when Roy sold it to me. You've got a gift, and I've got a mouth that'll tell everybody about it. Marge is fixing to hear your name before supper.
variants: Didn't think we'd beat the rain this week. Guess I owe you one.

fix_failure.speaker: hollis
fix_failure.text: Well...that wasn't the bad hose. Thursday just got a whole lot more expensive. Don't beat yourself up too much. Everybody around here learns the hard way eventually.
variants: Looks like we found the expensive problem first.
It ain't personal. Equipment's got a mean streak.

lend_hand.speaker: hollis
lend_hand.text: Appreciate the hands. Might not save the cutting, but it saves the week. People remember who shows up.
variants: County's built on favors more than money.
I keep score on these things. In a good way.

walk_away.speaker: hollis
variants: Rain don't much care what we're hoping.
Dealer'll get here eventually. Weather's the one I'm worried about.
